## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Spec Alignment

Does this relate to an existing section in the [spec](../../en-quire-spec.md)? If so, which one?

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references.
